subject: SIP Weekly Update - Week ending 3 Oct
deck_filename: SIP Weekly Update - Week ending 3 Oct.pdf

content.answer:
Hi Ian,

Pls find SIP weekly update attached for your review.

Thank you.
Cuiwei

content.question:
Thanks.



Slide 3

   - Any sense why WH cross selling is dropping by so much?
- Are we exploring WH cross selling for other lanes on top of just MYSG?

Slide 5

   - What is the issue on TH side?
- Has MYPH and MYTH started yet?

Slide 14

   - On IDSIP Sea shipping, why is ADO uplift minimal?

Seems different from
   what ID team was proposing?
- On Dino, when are we starting to sell?
How is ADO like right now?

content.answer:
COGS increased to optimize MYWH P&L; 2) MYSG SIP P&L revised up to
         breakeven.
         -

         We will revise ADO targets for above 2 BUs for Nov-Dec due to
         above systemic changes that will last.
         -

   Are we exploring WH cross selling for other lanes on top of just MYSG?
   -

      Yes we are assessing potential and feasibility of local FBS
      cross-selling with MY/VN/PH local FBS teams; will bring findings
to Oct SIP
      monthly meeting for review.



Slide 5

   -

   What is the issue on TH side?
   -

      Challenges faced in TH 1) local RM has high number of ongoing
      initiatives, difficult to push acquisition KPIs; 2) initial group of ~20
      pilot sellers demand a high level of hand-holding to set up and start
      selling while TH Export Team has only 1 HC to support.
      -

      Aligned with THCB team the next steps
      -

         For THPH lane, work with PHCB to narrow down 1:1 pitching pool
         from 6k to 1-2k, focusing on most-wanted brands/SKUs PH need
and willing to
         support, then work with THBD to formalize into local RM KPI
[ETA 17 Oct].
         -

         Work with PHCB to build 2-3 success cases, showcase them in Nov TH
         seller summit [ETA end-Oct].
         -

         THCB in progress of hiring 3 BPOs into TH Export team to provide
         seller support; to ramp up mass pitching from mid-Oct alongside BPO
         onboarding.
         -

   Has MYPH and MYTH started yet?
   -

      Yes MYPH and MYTH launched on 22 Sep, has whitelisted 1st group of 9K
      existing MYSG Direct sellers via system pop-up, to invite them to open
      TH/PH shops. MTD 247 active sellers for MYPH, 203 active sellers for MYTH.
      -

      In progress of standardizing export CS / seller support process, then
      ramp up mass pitching to all MY eligible sellers from mid-Oct.



Slide 14

   -

   On IDSIP Sea shipping, why

Hi Ian,

Slide 3

   -

   Any sense why WH cross selling is dropping by so much?
   -

      MoM -1534 ADO mainly driven by
      -

         CB Choice LFF MY>SG -1334 ADO MoM, because in Sep SCS did not
         replenish SKUs that are 1) P&L -ve; 2) not doing well in MY
despite doing
         well in SG, as from P&L perspective it makes more sense to fulfil from
         CN-SG instead of CN-MY-SG.
         -

         MY local SCS>SG -346 ADO MoM, due to a reduction in ad b

content.question:
thanks



*From:* Cuiwei Sun <cuiwei.sun@shopee.com>
*Sent:* Wednesday, 8 October 2025 2:19 pm
*To:* Ian Ho <hoi@sea.com>
*Cc:* Jianghong Liu <jianghong.liu@shopee.com>; Shuning Wang <
shuning.wang@shopee.com>; Keljin Chua <keljin.chua@shopee.com>; Jason Yu <
jason.yu@shopee.com>; Yu Zhang <yu.zhang@shopee.com>; Ailin Xie <
ailin.xie@shopee.com>; Wei Qiang <wei.qiang@shopee.com>; Huang Wan-Jung <
wanjung.huangwj@shopee.com>; Chiong Zhi Ann <zhiann.chiong@shopee.com>; Wei
Loong Yong <weiloong.yong@shopee.com>; Linda Sun <linda.sun@shopee.com>;
Xiao Xuan Soh <xiaoxuan.soh@shopee.com>; Keith Huang <keith.huang@shopee.com>;
Joe Li <joe.liyc@shopee.com>; Lim Wan Ting <wanting.lim@shopee.com>; Ren
Jiahui <jiahui.ren@shopee.com>; Eveline Seah <eveline.seahyl@shopee.com>;
Lee Jia Yi <jiayi.jylee@shopee.com>; Faye Yan <faye.yan@shopee.com>
*Subject:* Re: SIP Weekly Update - Week ending 3 Oct



Hi Ian,



Slide 3

   - Any sense why WH cross selling is dropping by so much?

- MoM -1534 ADO mainly driven by


   - CB Choice LFF MY>SG -1334 ADO MoM, because in Sep SCS did not
         replenish SKUs that are 1) P&L -ve; 2) not doing well in MY
despite doing
         well in SG, as from P&L perspective it makes more sense to fulfil from
         CN-SG instead of CN-MY-SG.
         - MY local SCS>SG -346 ADO MoM, due to a reduction in ad budget
         from 1) COGS increased to optimize MYWH P&L; 2) MYSG SIP P&L
revised up to
         breakeven.
         - We will revise ADO targets for above 2 BUs for Nov-Dec due to
         above systemic changes that will last.


   - Are we exploring WH cross selling for other lanes on top of just MYSG?

- Yes we are assessing potential and feasibility of local FBS
      cross-selling with MY/VN/PH local FBS teams; will bring findings
to Oct SIP
      monthly meeting for review.



Slide 5

   - What is the issue on TH side?

- Challenges faced in TH 1) local RM has high number of ongoing
      initiatives, difficult to push acquisition KPIs; 2) initial group of ~20
      pilot sellers demand a high level of hand-holding to set up and start
      selling while TH Export Team has only 1 HC to support.
      - Aligned with THCB team the next steps


   - For THPH lane, work with PHCB to narrow down 1:1 pitching pool from 6k
         to 1-2k, focusing on most-wanted brands/SKUs PH need and willing to
         support, then work with THBD to formalize into local RM KPI
[ETA 17 Oct].
         - Work with PHCB to build 2-3 success cases, showcase them in Nov
         TH seller summit [ETA end-Oct].
         - THCB in progress of hiring 3 BPOs into TH Export team to provide
         seller support; to ramp up mass pitching from mid-Oct alongside BPO
         onboarding.


   - Has MYPH and MYTH started yet?

- Yes MYPH and MYTH launched on 22 Sep, has whitelisted 1st group of 9K
      existing MYSG Direct sellers via system pop-up, to invite them to open
      TH/PH shops. MTD 247 active sellers for MYPH, 203 active sellers for MYTH.
      - In progress of standardizing export CS / seller support process,
      then ramp up mass pitching to all MY eligible sellers from mid-Oct.



Slide 14

   - On IDSIP Sea shipping, why is ADO uplift minimal?

Seems different from
   what ID team was proposing?

- ID assessment uses a very aggressive growth assumption - that $0.06
      price reduction leads to ~20% ADO uplift, vs our real experience
is ~2% ADO
      uplift only.
      - Has aligned the assessment with IDSPX team and concluded that the
      ADO uplift (<500-800 ADO on IDMY max) not able to justify a new channel.
      Therefore we will park the Seashipping channel discussion.
      - Instead, we will explore with IDSPX alternative CPO/lead time
      saving initiatives focusing on parcel vol allocation and air channel CPO
      optimization.



   - On Dino, when are we starting to sell?
How is ADO like right now?
